sections.title: Might Have — Introduction and Formula
sections.explanation: Might Have is an essential building block of spoken and written English. Formula: Subject + might have + past participle (weaker/more uncertain possibility than may have). Rules: 'Might have' is even more uncertain than 'may have' about a past event | Formula: might have + V3 (past participle) | Often used in hypothetical or very tentative statements | Negative: might not have + V3
sections.formula: Subject + might have + past participle (weaker/more uncertain possibility than may have)

examples.hindi: वह शायद गया होगा, लेकिन पक्का नहीं।
examples.english: He might have gone, but I am not sure.

examples.hindi: शायद उसने यह सुना होगा।
examples.english: She might have heard this.

examples.hindi: शायद उन्होंने मेरी बात मानी होगी।
examples.english: They might have agreed with me.

examples.hindi: शायद वह वहाँ पहुँच गया होगा।
examples.english: He might have reached there.

examples.hindi: शायद उसने मुझे भूल दिया होगा।
examples.english: She might have forgotten me.

examples.hindi: शायद हमने गलत सोचा होगा।
examples.english: We might have thought wrong.

sections.title: Might Have — Daily Life Usage
sections.explanation: Everyday sentences using Might Have for daily conversation.
sections.formula: Subject + might have + past participle (weaker/more uncertain possibility than may have)

examples.hindi: शायद उन्होंने यह प्लान बदल दिया होगा।
examples.english: They might have changed this plan.

examples.hindi: शायद वह इसके बारे में जानता होगा।
examples.english: He might have known about this.

examples.hindi: शायद उसने यह नहीं देखा होगा।
examples.english: She might not have seen this.

examples.hindi: शायद हम गलत रास्ते पर चले गए होंगे।
examples.english: We might have gone the wrong way.

examples.hindi: शायद उसने कुछ छिपाया होगा।
examples.english: He might have hidden something.

examples.hindi: शायद वह देर से सोई होगी।
examples.english: She might have slept late.

sections.title: Might Have — Office & Professional Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Might Have — ऑफिस और पेशेवर उपयोग
sections.explanation: Practice Might Have in professional and office contexts.
sections.formula: Subject + might have + past participle (weaker/more uncertain possibility than may have)

examples.hindi: शायद उन्होंने मेरी मदद की होगी।
examples.english: They might have helped me.

examples.hindi: शायद उसने वादा तोड़ा होगा।
examples.english: He might have broken the promise.

examples.hindi: शायद वह पहले जान चुकी होगी।
examples.english: She might have already known.

examples.hindi: शायद हमने गलती की होगी।
examples.english: We might have made a mistake.

sections.title: Might Have — Negative and Question Forms
sections.hindiTitle: Might Have — नकारात्मक और प्रश्न रूप
sections.explanation: How to make negative sentences and questions using Might Have. Common mistakes: wrong verb form after the modal, or missing "have" in perfect modals.
sections.formula: Subject + might have + past participle (weaker/more uncertain possibility than may have)

examples.hindi: शायद उन्होंने कुछ नहीं कहा होगा।
examples.english: They might not have said anything.

examples.hindi: शायद वह अब तक पहुँच गया होगा।
examples.english: He might have arrived by now.

examples.hindi: शायद उसने मुझसे नाराज़ी जताई होगी।
examples.english: She might have been upset with me.

examples.hindi: शायद हम इसे बेहतर कर सकते थे।
examples.english: We might have done this better.
